mapper.insert: INSERT INTO game_participations ( member_id, game_id, return_rate, game_rank, earned_score, post_score, earned_cash, post_cash, entered_at ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{gameId}, #{returnRate}, #{gameRank}, #{earendScore}, #{postScore}, #{earnedCash}, #{postCash}, #{enteredAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, email, nickname, role, cash, total_score FROM members WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE cash, total_score FROM members WHERE id = #{id}
